title: Between Tides
description: A solo exhibition featuring Cherise's seascape and coastal works from 2023–2025, exploring memory and impermanence through shifting shorelines and tidal rhythms.

title: New Contemporaries: Emergence
description: A juried group show spotlighting twelve emerging painters from the Northeast. Cherise will present three large-scale works from the Botanical Ghosts series.

title: Quiet Hours
description: A solo show centred on Cherise's still life and interior paintings. The exhibition traced the emotional weight of domestic spaces and the objects we choose to keep close.

title: Material Language
description: A two-person exhibition with sculptor Dana Fenn, exploring texture and surface across painting and ceramics. Cherise debuted her mixed-media panel works here.

title: Under the Same Sky
description: A group landscape exhibition bringing together ten painters from across the Eastern seaboard. Cherise exhibited four seascapes and one salt-marsh study.

title: First Light
description: Cherise's debut solo exhibition — a collection of small-format oil studies created during a self-directed residency at her home studio over the autumn of 2023.
